channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The rebirth of Pebble is radically unambitious
item.description: Eric Migicovsky has barely started working on a successor to the Pebble smartwatch, and he’s already talking about being finished with it. Eight years ago, Migicovsky shut down the smartwatch startup he founded, having sold its software assets to Fitbit, which later became part of Google.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Showing memory usage in Linux by process and user
item.description: There are a lot of tools for looking at memory usage on Linux systems. Some are commonly used commands like ps, while others are tools like top that allow you to display system performance stats in various ways.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Grimes rips Elon Musk for using their 4-year-old son as ‘a prop’ in Trump appearances
item.description: MSNBC host Lawrence O'Donnell also said that the little boy's presence in an Oval Office press conference with Trump Tuesday was 'a power play' by the tech billionaire.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: A deep-sea neutrino telescope spots the most energetic ghost particle yet
item.description: A neutrino detector submerged in the Mediterranean Sea has sniffed out the most energetic ghost particle yet.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to delete multiple text messages on a Mac and iPad
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains the steps to declutter text messages on a Mac or iPad. Apple offers ways to do this more efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yes, you can still upgrade Windows 10 PCs to Windows 11
item.description: Windows 10 has less than a year left before it hits its end of support deadline. Starting in October 2025, you’ll have to pay for security updates if you want to keep using Microsoft’s nearly-nine-year-old operating system.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Keep your code open to possibilities
item.description: I’ve been developing software for many years now. Decades. I’ve learned a lot along the way, and I dare to think that I’ve collected some wisdom about software development worth sharing with others. At some point, you think “Yeah, I’ve got a grip on this thing.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Monday.com aims to be an ‘AI-First’ platform with latest enhancements
item.description: Monday.com has accelerated its push into artificial intelligence (AI) with the announcement this week of its AI vision, which includes three areas of focus: AI Blocks, embedded Product Power-ups, and a forthcoming Digital Workforce of AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Elon Musk $97.4 billion bid complicates matters for OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has dismissed a $97.4 billion takeover bid led by rival Elon Musk, but the unsolicited offer could complicate Altman’s push to transform the maker of ChatGPT into a for-profit company.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Thalia Beaty And Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order
item.description: Ilona Cohen, the chief legal and policy officer at HackerOne, explains why President Joe Biden’s new cyber executive order should be a priority. The post Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Brave browser gets built-in functionality to run custom scripts
item.description: It’s been possible for a while now to modify web pages using popular extensions such as Tampermonkey and Greasemonkey, which can be useful for avoiding annoying ads or tracking attempts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple’s security patch highlights the growing security threat
item.description: Apple’s platforms may be more secure by design than others, but that doesn’t make them invulnerable to attack. That’s why every user should install the company’s latest security patch — it fixes a hole Apple says may already have been in active use.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US cracks down on Russian ransomware networks
item.description: The U.S. took aim at two separate Russian ransomware networks Tuesday, announcing new sanctions and arrests against a Russia-based internet service provider and several Russian nationals.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Top translation apps for travelers
item.description: Travel abroad worry-free with these top translation apps for travelers. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson highlights some favorites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ESA’s space telescope Euclid discovers ‘astonishing' Einstein ring
item.description: The European Space Agency's Euclid space telescope was going through preliminary tests in September 2023 when it captured images of an Einstein Ring in a nearby galaxy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Debate about political CIOs takes on new life with OPM memo
item.description: Agencies have until Friday to decide if they want to reclassify their CIOs as “general” Senior Executive Service positions instead of “career reserve.” The post Debate about political CIOs takes on new life with OPM memo first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: A new interpreter in Python 3.14 delivers a free speed boost
item.description: Python 3.14, due out later this year, is set to receive a new type of interpreter that can boost performance by up to 30% with no changes to existing code. The CPython 3.14 change log describes the feature as “a new type of interpreter based on tail calls.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FPGAs lose luster in genAI era
item.description: In a world gone mad over GPUs for AI acceleration, FPGA processors are seeing limited adoption in the data center for genAI workloads, with their primary use still in embedded markets and edge AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Internet upgrade part of a move towards 400/800G connectivity
item.description: The industry transition to 400 Gigabit Ethernet networking took a big step forward this week when the world’s leading Internet exchange operator announced plans to upgrade its New York backbone to 400G.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NetOps teams ready to dump incumbent monitoring tools
item.description: Replacing a network management tool is not a trivial exercise, especially in large and complex networks. It can take months to install and tune a tool so that it is delivering value.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Your ‘new’ Seagate data center hard drive is likely a used one
item.description: A growing number of buyers have reported purchasing supposedly new Seagate data center-grade hard drives, only to discover that they had been previously used for thousands of hours.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google’s generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help connect agents with databases
item.description: Google’s cloud computing division, Google Cloud, has added a new generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help enterprise developers connect agent-based generative AI applications to its databases.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The future is far from doom and gloom for DBAs
item.description: Database administration has always been something of a well kept secret. Even within the wider domain of information technology, database administration is one of those areas of expertise that often goes overlooked by aspiring STEM students and tech-savvy job seekers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump's AI ambition and China's DeepSeek overshadow an AI summit in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The geopolitics of artificial intelligence will be in focus at a major summit in France where world leaders, executives and experts will hammer out pledges on guiding the development of the rapidly advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Latino workers working to overcome a technological divide brought on by automation, AI
item.description: As jobs become more reliant on technology some Latino workers can be left behind due to a lack of digital skills exacerbated by a lack of accessibility.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Huge healthcare data breach exposes over 1 million Americans' sensitive information
item.description: Community Health Center, a Connecticut-based healthcare provider, has disclosed a recent data breach affecting over 1 million people in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How the slash-and-burn tactics Musk brought to Washington backfired at Twitter
item.description: When Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2022, he laid off thousands of employees, stopped paying rent and auctioned off coffee makers and office chairs in hopes of a big turnaround.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Full-stack JavaScript leads the way
item.description: Building web apps begins with a simple premise, but the real-world experience is a juggling act of optimizations, best practices, toolchains, and so on. Developers tend to respond by doing what we do best: creating new tools and techniques to manage ever-changing demands.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New law in Brazil is making students put away their smartphones at school
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian students returned to class this week with a new task: staying away from their smartphones as a new law restricting their use in schools took effect.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups
item.description: GSA senior leaders are saying the Trump administration’s long-term goal is to merge GSA, OPM and OMB into a single agency. The post GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, KRON4
